programme.desc: Original Air Date: 26 June 2017. Tom Gleisner quizzes Ed Kavalee, Amanda Keller, Mick Molloy, Anne Edmonds & Sam Pang to see who can remember the most about the events of the week. Guest quizmasters: Olympia Valance & Gabi Simpson.

programme.title: Have You Been Paying Attention? S1 Ep. 25
programme.desc: Original Air Date: 21 July 2014. Hosted by Tom Gleisner, Have You Been Paying Attention? is a fast-paced and irreverent look at the news with five comedians competing to see who can remember the most about the events of the week.

programme.title: Have You Been Paying Attention? S5 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Original Air Date: 4 September 2017. Tom Gleisner quizzes Ed Kavalee, Chrissie Swan, Nick Cody, Kitty Flanagan & Sam Pang to see who can remember the most about the events of the week.

programme.title: Have You Been Paying Attention? S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Original Air Date: 29 August 2016. Tom Gleisner quizzes Ed Kavalee, Sam Pang, Amanda Keller, Mick Molloy & Kitty Flanagan to see who can remember the most about the events of the week. Guest Quiz Master: Justine Clarke & Chloe Esposito.

programme.title: Have You Been Paying Attention? S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Original Air Date: 22 August 2016. Tom Gleisner quizzes Ed Kavalee, Chrissie Swan, Marty Sheargold, Celia Pacquola & Dilruk Jayasinha to see who can remember the most about the events of the week. Special guest: Keira from The Bachelor

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 406
programme.desc: Pauly D and Vinny put on a Guido-themed comedy show, while Ron and Sammi try to patch things up. Snooki is so distraught over her long-distance relationship that JWOWW and Sammi decide to intervene.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 407
programme.desc: S4, Ep 7. When the roommates take a trip to the Italian Shore, Snooki & Deena party so hard they wind up in bed together. Whilst back in Florence, Team Meatball has a run-in with the Italian police.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 408
programme.desc: The boys spring Team Meatball from the police station after their accident. And when Snooki's boyfriend Jionni comes to visit, a romantic evening ends with Snooki sobbing alone on the street.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 409
programme.desc: Deena panics after missing her period. After an all-night fight with Jionni, Snookie decides to take a break from the relationship. Mike tries to win her over, but someone else ends up comforting her.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 410
programme.desc: After Mike's prank backfires, the guys visit Vinny's family in Sicily and the girls class it up on a Tuscan wine tour. Snooki learns the truth about her hook-up with Vin and must come clean to Jionni.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 411
programme.desc: Deena's still trying to 'do sex' with Pauly, the meatballs get an icy reception at a club, and the whole house turns on Mike after he stirs up drama one too many times. (S4, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 412
programme.desc: Mike's antics have proven too much and Ron demands he make amends. As the crew count down the days until their return to Seaside, Mike wonders whether or not to join them at the Shore. (S4, ep12)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 453
programme.desc: After a summer full of popping and breaking bottles, heartache, hookups, and car-crashing, wall-smashing drama, the cast reunite to open up old wounds and say goodbye to Florence.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 501
programme.desc: The roommates return from Italy and couldn't be more excited to get back to the Jersey Shore. But a drama storm is brewing as Mike threatens to destroy Snooki's relationship with Jionni. (S5, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 502
programme.desc: Vinny weighs his options: Should he stay, or head home to Staten Island? Snooki fights with Jionni, and the roommates are back to their usual antics - partying and tanning to the extreme. (S5, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 503
programme.desc: The roommates struggle to adjust to life at the Shore without Vinny, while Mike confronts his own internal demons. But it's also Pauly's birthday and he gets the best present of his life! (S5, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 504
programme.desc: Mike returns only to find out that Danny has threatened to get new roommates! The girls hire strippers for Pauly and Mike's wild birthday party whilst the roomies go to kidnap Vinny. (S5, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 505
programme.desc: Vinny returns and everyone celebrates. The Situation tries hard to be nice but ends up annoying the boys. Snooki struggles with an uncomfortable condition. (S5, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 506
programme.desc: The Situation secretly gathers information to bring down one of his roommates - and for once it isn't Snooki. JWOWW freaks out when Roger disappears and doesn't return her calls. (S5, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 507
programme.desc: One of the roommates cause drama with the Snooki and Deena, while Jenni's skimpy outfit creates a problem for Roger. A crazy night at Karma nightclub ends in a fight. (S5, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 508
programme.desc: The cast tries to avoid a shark attack when they go fishing. Jenni confronts Pauly's stalker. Snooki sets her sights on Vinny when her boyfriend rejects her affections. (S5, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 509
programme.desc: Mike decides he can wait no longer to reveal 'the truth' to Snooki's boyfriend. Pauly, Vinny, and Deena find it difficult to be the single roommates in the Shore House. (S5, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 510
programme.desc: A battle royale breaks out after Mike reveals to Jionni that he hooked up with Snooki. Some of the roommates go camping, while Vinny and Pauly pull the greatest prank in Shore history! (S5, ep10)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 511
programme.desc: As the roommates prepare to leave, Mike starts a rumour about Deena's sister. Pauly and Vinny prank the house, and the Storm of the Century hits the Shore. (S5, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 512
programme.desc: The drama continues when the Jersey Shore house mates get together to relive the highs and lows of the past summer.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 601
programme.desc: Everyone returns to the shore for one last time. The Situation comes clean about his recovery and Snooki faces the challenge of being pregnant in a party house. (S6, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 602
programme.desc: The roommates settle in to life at the shore, Deena copes with being away from her boyfriend and Nicole makes an announcement that shocks the house. (S6, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 603
programme.desc: There are some big changes in store for the loveable gang, but expect even more all-night partying, hot hook-ups and shocking tantrums than ever before. (S6, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 604
programme.desc: Jenni plans a surprise birthday party for Roger that goes south, Deena auditions Danny to be a meatball and the roommates find themselves in the middle of a brawl at the club. (S6, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 605
programme.desc: Jenni learns the extent of her injury. Mike considers taking things with Paula to the next level. Deena holds Meatball Auditions and ends up rolling out of the sauce pan and into the fire. (S6, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 606
programme.desc: Jenni wonders where she stands with Roger and realises they might be in more trouble than she thought. Mike decides it is time for him to take his relationship with Paula to the next level. (S6, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 607
programme.desc: Mike adjusts to being in a relationship and gets confused about the rules. Deena goes back to her meatball ways, but has to fight for her right to party. (S6, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 608
programme.desc: Sammi confronts Deena about her meatball antics and the two of them go head-to-head. Mike and the roommates get to know Paula's wild side, and Mike isn't sure he can handle it. (S6, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 609
programme.desc: Jenni plans a 'Shore Shower' for Nicole and invites all the roommates. The guys support Mike's decision to dump Paula and tag along for a front row seat to all the action. (S6, ep9)

programme.title: Australian Survivor S5 Ep. 17
programme.desc: It may be the end of the game for a contestant after a betrayal gets leaked. With so much now at stake, no one is safe from elimination without winning that immunity challenge.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S5 Ep. 18
programme.desc: The game has taken a turn and for one player, an opportunity presents itself after a major player is betrayed and vows revenge, looking to build their numbers and blindside the hell out of someone!

programme.title: Australian Survivor S5 Ep. 19
programme.desc: When the reward challenge is a night away complete with spa and bed, it's every tribe member for themselves. Once the winner is decided, those back at camp plan a devious move for the next vote.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S5 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Sometimes the swing vote in Survivor is the most powerful position to be in. During Tribal Council, one tribe member is implored for their vote by both sides, giving them the power of the game.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S5 Ep. 21
programme.desc: After missing out on the immunity challenge win, a hunt for an idol ensues and as always with Tribal Council, not all is as it seems and Jonathan has one last trick up his sleeve.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S5 Ep. 22
programme.desc: With one tribe member on the bottom of the group, they know the only way to secure their place in the game is to win individual immunity.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S5 Ep. 23
programme.desc: With the next immunity challenge deciding who will make the final three, it's more important than ever to be on your game, but for one castaway, island life is taking a toll on their body.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S5 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Three become two in an epic showdown of endurance and strength in the final challenge and then, arguments are pitched and the Jury votes are cast to determine who will be crowned the Sole Survivor.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S5 Ep. 25
programme.desc: Join us for the live reveal of the Sole Survivor. With the castaways all back together, it's the tell all reunion show no one will want to miss.

programme.title: Survivor US S16 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A group of contestants must fend for themselves after being marooned in a hidden location while competing in physically and mentally exhausting challenges to be crowned Sole Survivor.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Becker gets in hot water with parents when his nutrition lecture at an elementary school turns into a sex talk.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: An unflattering picture of someone other than John is placed in an article about him, causing him distress.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 18
programme.desc: John gets a portable talking computer for his speech-impaired patient, with unintended consequences.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Reggie decides to help Jake fulfill some of the dreams he had as a child, with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Bob uses a questionable friend to get Reggie a great deal on a new freezer. John acts as a sex therapist for the Bennetts, an 80-year-old couple having difficulties because of Mr. Bennett's newly revived libido.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Dr. John Becker's laundry, apartment, and mail have all been tampered with and he is sure the culprit is one of his pesky neighbors.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 22
programme.desc: When John receives some expensive steaks from a patient, his new neighbor Chris cajoles him into throwing a party.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 23
programme.desc: John is surprisingly concerned when he learns that his new neighbor Chris has left town without saying goodbye.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Reggie and Chris compete for John's affection. Linda takes Margaret out for a night on the town.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: John enters the diner from Reggie's apartment, trying to sneak out.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Now that Reggie is gone, John tells Chris he has feelings for her (Chris).

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: John sits on his fire escape, smoking a cigar, the smoke from which is wafting into Chris's open window directly above.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: As John and Jake chat about Chris at the diner, Bob rushes in and announces that he just saw Chris naked when he went to fix her faucet.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Becker has a videotape of a French film that he plans to use to lure Chris into coming over to his place.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Becker tries to discourage a friend from expressing interest in Chris by telling him that she is gay.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: At the diner, Chris is in the kitchen when a robber enters.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Christmas Episode- At the diner, John expresses his repulsion for all the Christmas decorations.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 11
programme.desc: At the office, Margaret reveals to Linda that it's her ten-year anniversary of working for Dr. Becker.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 12
programme.desc: One of John's patients, a high school student named Brad, comes in for a physical and John learns that the guy's being sexually active, but isn't practicing safe sex. John performs an HIV test on Brad and tries to convince him to begin practicing safe sex.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Bob is distraught because a thirty-something guy at his gym died while on the treadmill, and he's certain that he's headed for the same fate.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Becker is upset when a patient substitutes his Christian Science faith for medical treatment.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 15
programme.desc: John helps his elderly neighbor, Mrs. Firth, get into her apartment and she repays him by making homemade chicken noodle soup.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 16
programme.desc: John's at the end of his rope with his hectic practice and makes a call, which Linda overhears, telling the person on the other end that he can't take another day.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 17
programme.desc: When a customer leaves the diner because of John's cigarette smoke, Chris puts her foot down and tells him that it is now a "smoke-free" restaurant.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 18
programme.desc: John arrives at the diner and announces that he has quit smoking.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 19
programme.desc: John walks into the diner and sees Chris, Bob, and Jake standing around a booth.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 20
programme.desc: The fire marshal threatens to fine Chris for a faulty sprinkler system at the diner, but Chris flirts her way out of it.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Chris' ex-husband, Roger, is in town and comes to the diner to see her.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 22
programme.desc: John has a dream that he and Chris kissed each other. At the office, Linda is late and tells Margaret it's because her cab got hit by a runaway hotdog cart.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Highlights from last season include Chris and John exchanging "I love yous" as Chris is wheeled into surgery for an appendectomy.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 2
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake bemoans his poor financial status, and Hector proposes that he participates in a drug-testing program to earn money.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Chris and John have their first impromptu date, but Chris wants something more formal before taking the relationship any further, and tells John so.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 4
programme.desc: John takes Chris out for their first official date - to a cheap Chinese restaurant. both are excited about the possibility of their "first time."

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: As John and Chris get more serious in their relationship, Chris realizes that John is not as affectionate as she'd like him to be.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 6
programme.desc: At the diner, Hector tries to talk Jake into giving him money to invest in coffee futures, but Jake resists.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 7
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving and Chris wants to make dinner for John, who is totally against holidays.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 8
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake receives a letter and is shocked to find out that his late grandmother has left him $25,000.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Margaret tells John that a letter for a medical conference has arrived, but John scoffs, saying it's just an excuse for doctors to have a weekend in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Chris, Jake, Hector, and Linda are at the diner. Chris serves Linda her breakfast as John walks in and tells Linda that she needs to get to the office and help Margaret.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 11
programme.desc: At the diner, Chris and Jake complain about the cold weather when John walks in, happy because it's cold and flu season, which means more patients.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 12
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake is looking for someone to go downtown and pick up Stevie Wonder concert tickets for him with no luck.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Chris fears that John is going to break up with her after he invites her to dinner at a nice restaurant with no explanation.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: An enraged and irascible Dr. John Becker (Ted Danson) enters the diner in his typical bad mood and sends the patrons fleeing.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Becker arrives at the diner to find Reggie and Jake discussing their plans to take a sculpting class.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Becker is bombarded by sexual overtones throughout the day, beginning with a sensual dream that is interrupted by a neighbor's blaring music.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Becker enters the diner to find Reggie in a rotten mood. After some prodding, she reveals that her ballplayer boyfriend just dumped her.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: While railing on the evils of Beanie Babies, Becker gets annoyed when an overly friendly delivery guy named Todd stops by the diner.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: While Becker is at the diner with Jake and Reggie, an odd little man named Bob enters.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Becker is livid when he is awakened by a brightly flickering streetlight outside his window.

programme.title: Above Suspicion S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: DI Anna Travis returns, investigating the murder of ex-cop Frank Brandon. As secrets unravel, an autistic witness may hold the key to exposing a deadly web of lies.

programme.title: Above Suspicion S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Passed over for promotion, Langton leads the case of star Amanda Delany's murder. A crucifix, silent screams and a second death point to dark secrets in her past, and a killer still close.

programme.title: Above Suspicion S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Travis joins Alan Daniels on a date and grows more convinced of his innocence, but is it just another performance? And could he still have more of his story to reveal?

programme.title: Above Suspicion S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The hunt for killer Charles Wickenham leads to dark family secrets, a torture cellar, and a shocking twist, his body found trapped in hiding. Justice, in the end, comes from the shadows.

programme.title: Above Suspicion S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Petrozzo dies from a forced fentanyl OD. Travis links it to a 30M stash stolen in Miami. A diary entry Godot leads her to Julia's ex, who may be a dangerous fugitive using an alias.

programme.title: Above Suspicion S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Amanda's lovers are questioned, one lost a crucifix, another's wife saw a man at the flat. Her toy rabbit and drugs are missing. Another body turns up, and secrets keep piling up.

programme.title: Above Suspicion S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Langton learns Wickenham abused both daughters, Emily and Justine, and killed in Black Dahlia style. Evidence from Gail and photos expose him; he dies trapped, likely by the protective housekeeper.

programme.title: Above Suspicion S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: David Rushton is found dead like Petrozzo fentanyl overdose, CCTV turned to the wall. A shaken Julia is questioned. A blurry CCTV image may reveal the killer, could it be Fitzpatrick?

programme.title: Above Suspicion S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Felicity Turner's body is found. Jeanie admits to holding Amanda's diary, linking Lester James as lover and pusher. CCTV reveals the killer. Langton learns of betrayal; Anna's promotion news arrives.

programme.title: Accused S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Special needs teacher Alison and her unemployed husband David are drifting apart. Though she initially rejects the advances of a charming work colleague, David does not believe her.

programme.title: Accused S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Young Frankie Nash joins the army to get off an assault charge and is sent to Afghanistan with best mate Peter, who only joined up to impress his war hero father and goes to pieces under fire.

programme.title: Accused S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Teenager Rob Ryland is killed in the warehouse where he works. Rob's parents Helen and Frank start to become suspicious when they learn that Rob's boss has been instructed by his lawyer to hold back the body.

programme.title: Accused S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: After his little girl is molested in a park, Kenny assaults the man answering the culprit's description. But when the man dies, Kenny's attempts to lie to the police about his whereabouts only arouse the further suspicions of dogged inspector Warren.

programme.title: Accused S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Taxi driver Liam's gambling habit prevents him from buying a reward present for his daughter when she passes her exams, so he burgles a fare's house but becomes obsessed with the house owner.

programme.title: Accused S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mo Murray runs a hair salon with her friend Sue on an estate riven by gang violence. When Sue's son Sean is shot dead, Mo spearheads a local group informing on drug dealers in the area.

programme.title: Accused S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Peter Cartwright engages Charlotte, a nurse, to tend his dying wife Katherine. Several months after Katherine's death, he begins to date Charlotte, eventually marrying her.

programme.title: Accused S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Stephen Cartwright begins his sentence at an understaffed young offender unit. His wing officer, Tina Dakin, is concerned at his withdrawn attitude and attempts to prevent him from killing himself.

programme.title: Accused S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After a row with a drunken bigot, crossdresser Simon gets into a taxi with Tony Baines. Tony is fascinated by Simon's alter ego Tracie and the two begin an affair.

programme.title: Accused S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Plumber Willy Houlihan is all set to leave his wife and three children for his girlfriend Michelle when his daughter Laura announces her forthcoming wedding.

programme.title: Raw S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Jojo and Bobby get a rude awakening when the Garda come looking for their flat mate Eddie, who is suspected of dealing drugs.

programme.title: Raw S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A mysterious newcomer appears to re-open Raw and reunite the old team. But will her plans be thwarted at the last minute?

programme.title: Raw S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Fiona and Geoff use all of their savings to refurbish Raw — a high-risk strategy in Ireland's tough economic climate. Opening night is a success but a sudden robbery occurs.

programme.title: Raw S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Fiona is upbeat on her 40th birthday, until the gang receives news that the Raw building is to be sold.

programme.title: Raw S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Everyone is surprised when Jojo returns to Raw with a ring on her finger and a new husband in tow.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 11
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel celebrate the holiday season by fighting through BLACK AND BLUE FRIDAY, GETTIN' UGLY with Christmas sweaters, and spinning some HUMAN DREIDELS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 809
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo fly solo as they learn how dangerous it is to be born with "Turtle Blood", get in shape with "Beast 90x" and learn the advantages to being 100% "Prank Proof".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 16
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo choke down some STREET MEAT, party with a few SLITER SISTERS and hit the stairs with some extreme SLINKIES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 724
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling have rapper/producer Sage the Gemini on the show to find out if he's "Glide Or Die," get "Over Gassed," and announce to the world "I Love Sparks!"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 821
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, comedy icon Wanda Sykes joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to talk about what it means to have "Unpresidential Nipples," doling out "Momforcement," and the first-ever "Wandamania."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 810
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy-nominated recording artist Redfoo joins Rob, Stee-Lo and Chanel to talk about the " Legends Of Campfoo", going "Lights Out" and learn what it means to get "Party Rock'd".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 21
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Young M.A joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to talk about people who have HOT SAUCE, the meaning of RED LYFE, and the joy of CASH BATHS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 10
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, motivational speaker Michael Crossland joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to teach us the CROSSLAND METHOD, show us what it means when your dog is CROSS-BRED, and visit the FIELD OF NIGHTMARES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 716
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling and Chanel try out some "Competitive Sleeping," experience the confusion of "Creature Shock" and go too hard on a "Sunday Doneday."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 15
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip hop star Vic Mensa joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to check out some close calls in STILL ALIVE, learn creative ways to SAVE MORE MONEY and get extra strange with A LOT GOING ON.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 17
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, singer-songwriter Jessie J joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to learn how to DO IT LIKE A DUDE, hear some harsh truths in MOM-SPLAINING and watch the bodies slam in BANG BANG.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Music producer Clinton Sparks teaches Rob, Chanel, and Steelo how to make budget beats with SPARKS OF GENIUS, get cultured with some MASSHOLES, and cause some serious mom damage with MAMA TRAUMA.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 4
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip hop and R&B singer Ty Dolla $ign joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to check out some SIDE SHOWS, do a little NECK PREP, and find the hottest PORTA-PARTIES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 27
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, we celebrate the world of NASCAR, with a salute to PASS MASTERS, an introduction to NASCAR EXITS, and a look at what happens when people get PAVEMENTAL.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 3
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo celebrate a RUSSIAN THANKSGIVING, feel the wrath of some TEENY MEANIES and plug in with VIRTUAL RETIREMENT.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 815
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy-winning rapper and producer T-Pain joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to sweeten the sound of people's slams in "T-Pain Your Pain", talk about "Hard 180s"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 15
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy nominated singer-songwriter and actress Christina Milian joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to be amazed by some SUPERHUMANS, give some restaurants an F-RATING, and be terrorized by some FEATHER SHARKS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 828
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob shows Chanel and Sterling the animal mastery of "Beast Lords," the tragedy of having a "Craptastrophe" and the dangers of flying "Foot Bombs."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 818
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling see the secret skills it takes to be an "Undercover Badass," find a new way of "Gettin' Paid" and learn that some things are simply "Unforgivable."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 729
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined by pop singer Zara Larsson to go "Beast Catching," shed some "Beyonce Tears," and sing along to the "Worstest Love Of All."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 6
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo attend some BRO BURIALS, hang with a crew of LIL' TRUNKIES and teach us a new trend called SPEED BUMPING.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 9
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness Stranger Things actor Gaten Matarazzo joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo for a terrifying special episode as they witness PURE TERROR, get a TASTE OF THE GRAVE and try to avoid the DEMOGORGONS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 28
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel are joined by country musician Wheeler Walker, Jr. to discuss his BANNED MATES, analyze grooming techniques in MUFF MAINTENANCE, and explore the embarrassment of PREMATURE RELEASES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 18
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo take a vacation to LAKE PAINATONKA, catch the quick hands in GRABBIES and watch some unsuspecting people get EFFED FROM BEHIND.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 726
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling welcome model Ireland Baldwin to celebrate some "Bald Wins," run afoul of some "Trash Horses" and learn the difficulties of having "Outside Deficit Disorder."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 14
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness it's Ladies Night! Rob, Steelo, and Chanel celebrate incredible women with SUPER SHE-ROES, pay homage to mothers in MOMMIN' AIN'T EASY, and explore the fabled women's restroom in LEGENDS OF THE STALL.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel are joined by BMX legend Jamie Bestwick to experience some serious VERT HURT, keep kids in their place with YOUTH SLAYERS and get over-caffeinated with ROTHROCKED.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 2
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness rapper 21 Savage joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to go into SAVAGE MODE, update the dictionary with WORD BIRTHERS and prove you never know when a random object ISSA WEAPON.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 26
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, radio and TV star Charlemagne Tha God joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to PUT SOME RESPECK ON MY NAME, call out the DONKEYS OF THE DAY and realize some people are just DILDO DUMB.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 704
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel take a much needed "Karate Break", try to figure out what's wrong with some highly "Defective Pets", and play a classic game of "Heads Or Tails?"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 720
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Jackass and Wildboyz star Chris Pontius joins Rob, Chanel, and Sterling get up close in some "All-Natural Weirdness," dance with some "Party Boys,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 1
programme.desc: On the Season 9 Premiere of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo get CROPPED OUT, take a trip to their local HELL MART and enjoy some delicious PUMPKIN SPICE.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 30
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness Rob, Steelo and Chanel are joined by actor Matt Shively to experience some PARANORM-ISH ACTIVITY, do some ATTEMPTED MAN SHIT and meet some animals that are MILK READY.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 730
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip-hop duo Rae Sremmurd joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to celebrate the "Sremmlife," get hurt "Worse Than It Looks" and have somebody "Come Get Her"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 725
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined all the way from the UK by YouTube's Sam Sadler to rock out to some "Pins and Needles," get "Scared Forever,".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 21
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Waka Flocka Flame joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to consider hiring some QUALIFIED ROLLERS, marvel at people who use NO HANDS, and laugh at CRAPTICAL JOKERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 8
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel are joined by rapper G-Eazy to learn the DANGERS OF ALONE TIME, get a taste of the riches in THE ALMOST GOOD LIFE, and experience the heartbreak of being SERVED A CURVE.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 713
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, it's Sterling's time to shine as Rob quizzes him with a "Steelo Vision Test," the gang gets some "Trill Advice" and do all they can to avoid "The Brim Reaper."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 20
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Laker shooting guard Jordan Clarkson joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to throw down some JAMMIES, check out the TONGUE CAM and experience some water pain in the category GETTIN' LAKED.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 11
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Teyana Taylor joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to pay tribute to KID NAPPERS, and tell us about BIRTHDAY ASSASSINS, and what it's like to be in a LUST BUBBLE.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 12
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo dive head first into some DEAD POOLS, go into CARROT SHOCK and learn a valuable life lesson that EVERYTHING FARTS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 13
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy Award-winning duo The Chainsmokers join Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to cringe at some BITERS, ride STOLEN MATTRESSES and marvel at the magic of real-life TELEPORTERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 16
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, dedicated to the smart people who make our world a better place, Rob, Steelo and Chanel take a look at some lesser-known NERDACHIEVEMENTS, the dark side of science, with TRIAL AND TERROR

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 721
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling have NASCAR's Chase Elliott talk about "Hall Of Fame Dads," suffer a "Victory Lapse," and get a helping hand from some "Personal Pit Crews."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 826
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling look for some "Everyday Peens", watch some videos get "Dog Bombed" and check out some people who have serious "Motor Skills".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 712
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob welcomes WWE Diva, Paige, to learn what it's like to be "Born Badass," watch some "Everyday Divas" throwdown and learn there's no better insults than some "Proper Smack."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 707
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, trick shot superstars Dude Perfect joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to enjoy some "Dudebrations", witness the pain of "Dud Perfect," and learn about the dangers of "Bad Garretts."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 706
programme.desc: On a new episode of Ridiculousness, actor and rapper Machine Gun Kelly joins Rob to celebrate "Wild Boys," fend off the "Fun Police" and learn you can never be too scared of "Sky Coffins."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 8
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, talkshow host Steve Wilkos joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to check out some SURPRISE TITTIES, call STEVECURITY and watch the HIGHEST RATED CATEGORY EVER.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 816
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling enjoy some "White Whines", attend an "Animals Anonymous" meeting and take a trip to the most dangerous suburb in the country "Slamburbia."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 829
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, stunt person and Nitro Circus star Jolene Van Vugt stops by to get destructive with "Smash Happy," capture the perfect monkey moments in "Right Place, Right Monkey,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 29
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Post Malone joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to ball with some REALLY WHITE IVERSONS, get messy with the category SAUCIN' ON YOU and show off some KNUCKLE TATS.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: An Elephant Makes Love To A Pig: Kyle calls in genetic engineer Dr. Mephisto to crossbreed his pet elephant and Cartman's pot-bellied pig in a bid to win a science competition. (S1, E05)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Death: Stan's ancient grandfather attempts to trick the boys into killing him. Meanwhile, the parents of South Park lobby a TV network to rid the airwaves of Terrance and Phillip. (S1, E06)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A mishap at the morgue transforms the residents of South Park into brain-eating zombies and threatens the boys night of Trick-or-Treating.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Thanksgiving Episode- Mistaking Cartman for a starving African child, government authorities send him to Ethiopia where he runs into Sally Struthers.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Mr Hankey, The Christmas Poo: The Mayor decides to impose a holiday theme which won't offend anybody. Kyle tries to convince everyone that Mr Hankey (a singing Christmas poo) exists. (S1, E09)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Damien: The new kid in class persuades Jesus to do battle with his father, Satan, in the final battle of good versus evil. Cartman is livid to learn the bout clashes with his birthday. (S1, E10)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Tom's Rhinoplasty: The boys become lesbians to impress a new teacher, making Wendy jealous. Also, to his delight, Mr. Garrison's plastic surgery leaves him looking like David Hasselhoff. (S1, E11)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Mecha-Streisand: Cartman and Kyle fall out over a magic triangle they un-earth on an archaeological dig. The triangle yields the power to turn Barbra Streisand into a terrible monster. (S1, E12)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is A Dirty S**t (1): Dr. Mephisto helps Cartman un-cover the truth about his dad's identity. The spotlight is on quite a few of South Park's male residents. Who could it be? (S1, E13)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is Still A Dirty S**t (2): Dr Mephisto is shot before he reveals who Cartman's father is. Who exactly shot him? Meanwhile, the rest of the town try to deal with a blizzard. (S2, E02)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Barbrady resigns, anarchy ensues and the boys pitch in to help.

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Ike's Wee Wee: Kyle misunderstands what circumcision is and thinks he has to save Ike's penis from being cut off! Mr. Mackey is fired, and turns to drugs - "drugs are bad, m'kay?" (S2, E04)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Conjoined Fetus Lady: Kyle is terrified because he has to see the school nurse, who has a scary deformity. Meanwhile, the school dodgeball team goes to China - only Pip can save them now. (S2, E05)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: City On The Edge Of Forever: The school bus ends up perched on the edge of a ravine after it crashes in a snowstorm. Must be time for some flashbacks then! Can these memories be trusted? (S2, E07)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Summer Sucks: The boys' plans for 4th of July celebrations are ruined when the State bans fireworks. It's up to Uncle Jimbo and Ned to save the day with a little trip down Meheeco way. (S2, E08)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls: The Sundance Film Festival is in South Park but it's not long before Hollywood culture is over running the town and polluting the sewer where Mr Hankey lives. (S2, E09)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Chickenpox: The boys are sent to Kenny's for the night, so they can all get chickenpox. The boys decide to get even on their parents by hiring a prostitute with mouth herpes to infect them. (S2, E10)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Roger Ebert Should Lay Off The Fatty Foods: The boys are taken to the planetarium but Cartman has other ideas and decides to audition to sing the Cheesy Poofs song on their next advert. (S2, E11)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Clubhouses: Stan and Kyle build a clubhouse, so they can play truth or dare with Wendy and Bebe. Cartman and Kenny decide to build their own rival clubhouse based on The Ewoks Village. (S2, E12)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Cow Days: The boys try to win Terrance and Phillip dolls at the carnival but a dodgy carnie keeps changing the rules - time to call "shenanigans"! Cartman dates Leonardo DiCaprio. (S2, E13)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Chef Aid: Chef realises that Alanis Morissette's (fictional) hit song "Stinky Britches" is a song that he wrote years ago but the record company aren't interested in giving him any credit. (S2, E14)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Spooky Fish: When Stan is given a fish by his Aunt, he has a feeling there's something not quite right about it. Sure enough it's not long before there's evil goings on. (In spooky vision!) (S2, E15)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Merry Christmas, Charlie Manson!: Cartman's Uncle Howard escapes from prison with another inmate, Charlie Manson. The boys want to go see Mr Hankey at the mall but no one will take them. (S2, E16)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Gnomes (a.k.a. Underpants Gnomes): The boys must write an essay for school. Tweek suggests they write about gnomes that visit him every night and steal his pants. What will they discover? (S2, E17)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Rainforest Schmainforest: The boys go to the Costa Rican rainforest as a part of the "Getting Gay With Kids" choir tour, but Cartman is on a mission to cause havoc. Jennifer Aniston guests. (S3, E01)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Spontaneous Combustion: The citizens of South Park are randomly exploding and it's up to Stan to find the cause. Kyle discovers his dad is having problems with erectile dysfunction. (S3, E02)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The Succubus (a.k.a. Chef's Mama): The boys discover that Chef has a new girl who has changed him from a free-spirited, soul-singing hipster to that of a mediocre, religious paper pusher. (S3, E03)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Jakovasaurs: While camping, the boys discover the last two Jakovasaurs (a parody of Jar Jar Binks) on the planet. Will the townsfolk welcome them with open arms or find them very annoying? (S3, E04)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tweek vs. Craig: The boys coerce two of their classmates, Tweek and Craig, into a schoolyard fight. Craig learns martial arts with the aid of Cartman. Tweek is taught to box by Uncle Jimbo. (S3, E05)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Sexual Harassment Panda: After a school educational talk from Petey the Panda, Cartman decides to sue Stan for sexual harassment. Suing fever starts to grip the entire town! (S3, E06)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Cat O*gy (1): Stan's sister Shelley babysits Cartman and invites her unsuitable boyfriend, Skyler, to join her. Meanwhile Cartman's cat is on heat and it's not long before he's got company! (S3, E07)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Stan's parents drag him along to Mr. Mackey's meteor shower party, where he is sent down into the basement to play with Pip, Butters and Dougie.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Jewbilee (3): As all of South Park waits for the meteor shower to begin, Kyle and Ike go into the wilderness for a Jew Scouts Jewbilee. Kenny tags along and takes on the king of the woods... (S3, E09)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Korn's Groovy Pirate Ghost Mystery: The boys are being plagued by the 5th graders and South Park is overrun by Pirate Ghosts. Nu-Metal band Korn must save the day! (Scooby-Doo parody). (S3, E10)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Chinpokomon: Stan, Cartman, and Kenny are caught up in the latest fad from Japan, a cartoon called Chinpokomon - but what is the secret plan behind the show's anti-American sentiments...? (S3, E11)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Hooked on Monkey Fonics: The boys compete against a couple of home schooled kids in South Park's annual spelling bee. (S3, E12)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Starvin' Marvin In Space: Marvin is back! He and the boys travel around the world in an alien spaceship on a food-gathering mission, hotly pursued by the CIA and Sally Struthers. (S3, E13)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Cartman has visions of glory as he suits up for the Confederacy in the annual reenactment of a Civil War battle, and leads the drunken rebels to defeat the union.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Christmas Episode- An extravaganza of holiday songs are performed in unique South Park style, hosted by Mr. Hankey.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Are You There God, It's Me Jesus: Cartman claims to be going through puberty, making the boys jealous, and Jesus promises a New Year's Eve spectacle - so books Rod Stewart to play Las Vegas! (S3, E16)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Worldwide Recorder Concert: The class visit Mr Garrison's hometown for a recorder concert, where they attempt to find the mysterious 'brown noise'. What part does Kenny G play in this? (S3, E17)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Tooth Fairy Tats: Cartman gets $2 from the Tooth Fairy, which leads him to a scheme to buy a new videogame. It's not long before the boys are caught up in the black market tooth racket.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Cartman's Silly Hate Crime: Things go from bad to worse for Cartman after he throws a rock at Token - it's jail time for this racist! Will the boys win the sled race without lardy on board? (S4, E02)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Timmy! 2000: The boys copy Timmy's behaviour (who has ADD) in order to get out of doing homework. Timmy is heading for rock stardom - but not if Phil Collins has anything to do with it! (S4, E03)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Cartman Joins NAMBLA: Cartman joins The North American Man Boy Love Association but does he know what they really want? Meanwhile, Kenny will do anything to stop his parents having a kid. (S4, E05)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Cherokee Hair Tampons: When Kyle falls ill his mum goes to Miss Information's holistic medicine store - can herbs supplied by 2 "native" Americans really help? Guest stars Cheech and Chong. (S4, E06)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Chef's passionate protest declaring the South Park flag racist enflames the entire town.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Something You Can Do With Your Finger: Cartman is convinced that his dream is a sign from God, so corrals the boys into making a boyband called "Fingerbang". He's not happy when Wendy joins! (S4, E08)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Do The Handicapped Go To Hell? The boys are convinced they will go to hell when they die unless they confess all their sins. Satan is torn between two lovers: Chris and Saddam Hussein.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Probably: The boys build a church-shaped shack to live in and listen to Cartman the preacher man. Meanwhile, Satan turns to an unlikely source for advice about his relationship woes.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Therapy unearths a repressed memory from Foxxy's past. Xandir gives Toot a makeover.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 401
programme.desc: Daria and Jane team up with different partners on an economics project after new tensions over Tom put a rift between them.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 512
programme.desc: Rumors swirl at Lawndale High when Tom accidentally spends the night at Daria's house, Jake faces a medical issue, and Daria considers taking her relationship to a new level.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: While babysitting for a family of well-behaved but sheltered children, Daria enlists Jane to help her broaden the kids' horizons.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A spelling bee forces Foxxy to confront her champion past. Clara becomes addicted to car crashes.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: After Daria and Jane try to dissuade Ms. Li from allowing a modeling agency to scout for talent at Lawndale High, Quinn gets recruited to take modeling classes.

programme.title: Drawn Together S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Captain Hero's x-ray vision makes a housemate ill. Distraught, he seeks to give up his super powers.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 413
programme.desc: Tensions between Jane and Daria come to a head when Daria realizes that her feelings for Tom might be more complex than she'd ever expected.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Daria gets into a verbal altercation with a former Lawndale football player who returns to the school to have a goal post named after him.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Ling-Ling enters foster care, and Captain Hero time travels in order to play a prank on his past self.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: When Ms. Barch assigns lab partners for a behavioral science project, Daria is paired with disinterested jock Kevin, and Brittany is paired with the sleazy Upchuck.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Wilbur Cobb tells a campfire story about Galoot Wranglers. Ren goes crazy and is sent to a home. Here we see the whole cast of the Ren & Stimpy show has gone nuts.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The roommates take on Entertainment Weekly after a bad review. Captain Hero explores homosexuality.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Callie must care for her younger, hotter demon sister, who happens to be engaged to Twayne.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 313
programme.desc: Trent agrees to help Jane and Daria on their multimedia project, and Daria feels threatened when Jane falls for a guy named Tom.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 403
programme.desc: Lawndale's reputation takes a major hit when an injured Kevin leaves the football team after a motorcycle accident.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: While working on the school yearbook, Daria takes a liking to a formerly homeschooled student with many eccentricities.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Stimpy begins to prepare dinner for Ren when he falls in love with the main course, a chicken. Powdered Toastman tries to bring the president to Little Jimmy, but his warp speed burns him to a crisp.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 409
programme.desc: The residents of Lawndale are drawn to a new big box store that caters to their various needs, where Daria and Jane look for gummi bears for an art project.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: When Trent asks Daria for help finding a birthday gift for Jane, the two find themselves at a piercing parlor and Quinn and Helen team up for a fashion show.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After being drafted into Satan's dark army, Twayne and Mark must do their patriotic duty and end the world.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Randall's new arm lands him on the DOI's intramural football team, and Callie pimps out Leonard.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Stimpy's nose goblin, Frank Snotra, becomes famous. However when he's ready to perform, he gets stage fright. The side kick union is going on a massive strike and Stimpy is alerted.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 408
programme.desc: When Helen takes the family on a trip to look good for her boss, they find themselves subjected to intense psychotherapy to unearth their problems.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 412
programme.desc: When a kitchen fire does damage to the Morgendorffer home, the family goes to an expensive hotel while Daria stays with Jane and Trent at their house.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Clara appears on "Extreme Vaginal Makeover"; demented Toot gets committed by her roommates.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 502
programme.desc: Daria questions her relationship with Tom as their six-month anniversary approaches, and Jake pursues a new career with an internet start-up.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The death of Captain Girl forces Captain Hero to fight crime and grief solo. Toot adopts a baby.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Wooldoor discovers the healing powers of his bodily fluids. Ling-Ling finds love.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 411
programme.desc: A strange series of coincidences convinces Quinn that she has a guardian angel looking out for her, and Brittany's parents throw a party to celebrate her grades.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: When Jane's brother Trent is asked to perform at the Alternapalooza music festival with his band Mystik Spiral, Jane and Daria decide to accompany them on the road.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Rumors begin to swirl at school when a mysterious rash sends Daria to the hospital.

programme.title: Drawn Together S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The roommates get a surprise family visitor. Toot, Wooldoor and Xandir abuse Ling-Ling.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: When the roommates depart for a trip to the mall, Clara assumes they've been Raptured.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Callie is promptly promoted after turning into a man, causing strife in her relationship with Mark.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Helen and Jake realize how much they've changed while spending a weekend with their friends from college, and Jane and Daria join Trent on a trip to the flea market.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: A rabid Bat Boy takes a bite out of Mark, transforming him into New York City's latest superhero.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy are going to be the first dog and cat sent up to space in the Russian space program. In the spirit of the Hatfields and McCoys, Ren and Stimpy present the Nitwits and the Dimwits.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: It's the 11th hour at the dog pound and Ren and Stimpy are about to take that last long walk. A sweet rich old lady falls for them and adopts them immediately.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy are snowed in. Stimpy amuses himself with watching dark TV, whistling in a bottle and other mundane activities. Ren and Stimpy are watching TV when they see the opening of a new jail.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Mark accidentally reactivates Leonard's magical arranged marriage.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 405
programme.desc: While trying to be a conformist for an assignment, Jane is selected by the cheerleaders to replace Brittany on the squad.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Wooldoor gets his own progressive children's TV show, and Toot chases dreams of a hot dog truck.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Daria and Jane record a film about Quinn's daily life for a school project with the hopes of making her look ridiculous, but Daria's conscience begins to weigh on her.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Stimpy is becoming dangerously stupid. Ren is injected into Stimpy in a race against time to find the problem. Pierre convinces Ren and Stimpy to grow up and get a man's job - lumberjacking.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 505
programme.desc: Quinn and the Fashion Club look for ways to make a difference, and Daria feels self-conscious when she considers submitting a story to a publication.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Callie makes an evil Mark clone to compete in the DOI bowling league tournament.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The housemates take a trip back in time as tots with a taste for murder.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 310
programme.desc: Jake and Helen take off on a marriage seminar, and Daria and Quinn take a road trip to bail out Jane and Mystik Spiral.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 308
programme.desc: When Jane's family members all come home at once, she and Trent temporarily move into Daria's house, Helen and Jake pick Jane's brain, and Daria imagines a future with Trent.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy find an abandoned circus clown at their doorstep. While Ren DOES NOT want to keep him, Stimpy pleads and begs until Ren agrees. Stimpy the mad scientist replaces Ren's brain.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: When Daria and Jodie are invited to tour a school for gifted students, their parents struggle to get along, and Quinn finds herself at odds with her own friends.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 301
programme.desc: After a nearly disastrous driving lesson, Daria debates whether to switch from glasses to contacts, and Kevin experiments with a new accessory.

programme.title: Under Fire
programme.desc: Someone with a grudge against 15 Division opens fire on Andy and Chloe.

programme.title: You Can See the Stars
programme.desc: The officers have to piece together the truth about a past crime in order to find Oliver Shaw.

programme.title: Blink
programme.desc: Andy and Dov pull themselves together at an all-night diner, but are caught off-guard in a diner hold-up.

programme.title: All By Her Selfie
programme.desc: Oliver gets promoted to Acting Staff Sergeant, and Andy is tasked with training 15 Division’s newest rookie.

programme.title: Heart Breakers, Money Makers
programme.desc: Inspector Jarvis sends the officers to seize all “proceeds of crime” – anything purchased with illegal money.

programme.title: Wanting
programme.desc: After the discovery of an executed gang leader, 15 Division must find the killer before a gang war breaks out.

programme.title: Going Under
programme.desc: When 15 Division goes undercover at a club-land bar, Chris’s erratic behavior make Dov suspicious.

programme.title: Two Truths and a Lie
programme.desc: As the officers try to hunt down the killer of Brian Gowdy – Andy and Sam go on the road for interviews.

programme.title: Deal with the Devil
programme.desc: Oliver prepares Andy to defend herself at Duncan’s dismissal hearing, now happening two hours from now.

programme.title: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: An innocuous call to a middle-class home puts Dov and Chris in the middle of a home invasion investigation.

programme.title: Moving Day
programme.desc: 15 Division works on a program to help tenants move out of a subsidized-housing complex that’s being torn down

programme.title: Fragments
programme.desc: Andy’s former rookie, Duncan, is back on duty and looking to reconcile – something she’s not ready for yet.

programme.title: Everlasting
programme.desc: The officers work to find a bomber. But after catching him, they realize he has more targets set to explode.

programme.title: Open Windows
programme.desc: Andy is attacked by an intruder at Traci’s place and the Sex Crimes Unit steps in to take over the case.

programme.title: Perfect Family
programme.desc: Andy debates her future with Sam after learning the heart-breaking news that Marlo is pregnant with his baby.

programme.title: Uprising
programme.desc: A riot breaks out at a women’s prison while Andy, Juliet, Nick, and Gail are there to transfer prisoners.

programme.title: Letting Go
programme.desc: Nick’s estranged older brother emerges with new information on someone from their tragic past.

programme.title: A Real Gentleman
programme.desc: When Traci is a no-show for her first raid, 15 Division fears the gun dealer they’re after has kidnapped her.

programme.title: Home Run
programme.desc: After a baseball game erupts in a drive-by shooting, Gail and her brother search for the shooter.

programme.title: Best Man
programme.desc: Andy and Sam are shocked to learn that Oliver is the prime suspect in IA’s corruption investigation.

programme.title: Integrity Test
programme.desc: Andy, Dov, Gail, and Nick undertake a risky plan to prove that Commissioner Alonso Santana is corrupt.

programme.title: Ninety Degrees
programme.desc: A heat wave hits and Jarvis opens the division to the public as a cooling station.

programme.title: Breaking Up the Band
programme.desc: Now that Sam and Marlo’s baby girl has arrived, it’s clear nothing could have prepared Andy for this moment.

programme.title: 74 Epiphanies
programme.desc: With the 15 Division restructure looming, Andy and Sam’s wedding lets the gang celebrate one last hurrah.

programme.title: Fresh Paint
programme.desc: A high-stakes takedown goes awry upon the revelation that rookie cop Andy McNally has busted one of her own.

programme.title: Mercury Retrograde
programme.desc: As the other rookies hunt for an escaped convict, Swarek lets Andy in on his past undercover exploits.

programme.title: Fite Nite
programme.desc: The rookie cops duke it out for a cause at “Fite Nite.”

programme.title: Signals Crossed
programme.desc: Andy trades in her uniform for something more risqué when she goes undercover as a prostitute.

programme.title: Out of the Darkness
programme.desc: The pressure is on when a famous race horse is sent to Heartland to see if it can be rehabilitated.

programme.desc: Ty's ex shows up at Heartland and stirs up trouble. Lou is reunited with Mrs. Bell's miniature horse.

programme.desc: Tim's visit to Heartland causes sibling rivalry between Lou and Amy. Jack takes Lisa Stillman fishing.

programme.desc: Amy’s surprised to learn Finn has returned to town. Jack and Tim win Hudson’s Entrepreneur of the Year Award.

programme.desc: When flood evacuees come to Hudson, Amy works with a traumatized horse. Jack and Lisa help a young couple.

programme.title: Into the Wild

programme.title: Vigil

programme.desc: Amy leads a trail ride to help with Jessica’s new photography job. Lou’s latest mayoral event upsets Rick.

programme.desc: Amy and Lou go on a road trip to stop a Miracle Girl imposter. Amy questions if she should visit Finn.

programme.desc: Amy agrees to let Logan take the lead with a new client horse. Lou struggles to reconnect with Katie.

programme.title: Memory
programme.desc: A surprise visitor causes Amy to see Finn differently. Lou and Peter’s dinner party doesn’t go as planned.

programme.title: Striking a Balance
programme.desc: Amy helps Lisa with Platinum Bow. Tim has a difficult visit with Shane. Katie leads a strike at Maggie’s.

programme.title: Learning to Fly
programme.desc: Amy helps Georgie rediscover her passion for showjumping. A Winter Fair allows Tim to help Jessica.

programme.title: A Light in the Dark
programme.desc: Jack faces the truth about his rift with Al Cotter. Lou and Peter take the next step in their relationship.

programme.title: The Path Less Traveled
programme.desc: Amy is surprised when a very pregnant Mallory shows up at the ranch with a wild horse.

programme.title: Taking the Reins
programme.desc: Amy and Jack retrain Edwin’s horse for carriage racing, bringing Amy and Edwin closer.

programme.title: The Heart Wants
programme.desc: Amy helps Caleb with his son’s pony. Lou and Jessica start a new venture, while Katie tries a risky new hobby.

programme.desc: Riding home on the train one day, a man falls asleep and dreams it is 1880, and he is entering a small town called Willoughby.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 36
programme.desc: A playwright makes characters come to life.

programme.desc: Small time criminal Jackie Rhoades must face both his past and his conscience while waiting for his next assignment.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Bartlett Finchley's paranoia about the machines around proves true.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Seeking refuge from a storm, traveler David Ellington comes upon a bizarre hermitage of monks, who have imprisoned a man who begs for his help. When David confronts the head monk Brother Jerome, he is told that the man is the devil, and David must decide

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 6

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A pair of newlyweds stopping in a small town are trapped by their own superstition when playing a fortune-telling machine in a local diner.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The daughter of an inventor objects to their 'perfect' home where they are waited on by mechanical servants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: A nostalgic actor revisits his late wife and friends at their old haunt, only to find that he is now out of place there.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 10

programme.desc: In a tragic, western town, a desperate father begs for clemency as his son is slated to die for an accident he could not have prevented.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 22

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 27

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 29

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 4

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 5

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 6

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 26
programme.desc: A mad bomber whom Dr. Sloan helped put away has escaped and wants the good doctor blown away.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 1

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mark investigates when her older lover, a new state Supreme Court Justice, murders a teenage girl.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 3

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Community General is already under increased security, with a high-profile criminal hospitalized, when an important businesswoman is brought in. Mark suspects her security guard has deadly intentions.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Jesse's new part-time job as a trainer of the pro basketball Mustangs turns deadly when he's accused of murdering a star player.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan investigates a plastic surgeon when an actress's death apparently results from an infection contracted during surgery.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 7

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Steve and Ron lead the chase for the stolen nuclear material.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The Sloans run into plenty of industry politics when they investigate the death of television network executive, Rachel Woodrall. Seamy revelations about Woodrall's college sorority lead to the killer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Jesse finally reunites with his father. After they narrowly elude an assassin, Jesse begins to realize his father isn't the accountant he's always claimed to be, but rather a spy. The Travis's attempt to discover who's sending the killers.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 11
programme.desc: A dead mime leads to an investigation of a crooked auto dealer. Randy Wolfe, a woman who's apparently an expert at everything, leads the investigation while continually annoying Steve.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 12
programme.desc: A motorcycle stunt driver has a fatal accident while filming an action video. Steve investigates.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 13

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 14

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 15

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 16
programme.desc: A spat between a girl and her boyfriend leads to an apparent murder, leaving the girl and her mother with a dead body, just as dinner guests Mark and Amanda arrive.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 17
programme.desc: A madman charges into a Lamaze class with a bomb, claiming that a fertility doctor was cheating him. Everything is complicated further when said doctor turns up dead.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Ratings seeking stunts by TV talk show hosts Darren & Mary have tragic results.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 19
programme.desc: When a rash of deaths at a high school revolves around one 'helpful' young girl, Dr. Sloan risks his own life to uncover the murderer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 20

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 21

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 23

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 24

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Highlights of the most dramatic moments and bonus footage are shown in this special episode.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: A night of passion in the romantic city of Milan leads to consequences.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: As the competition comes to a close, the three finalists try to remain composed as they face increased pressure and only one will triumph.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The first photo shoot has the women squaring off while posing as famous British and American public figures.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Some of the models resist getting make-overs and a few of them are unhappy with their new looks.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The women must create an ad campaign, which includes casting, wardrobe, providing props and hair and make-up.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The American women start to break down while the British rally together. Kelly Cutrone and Nigel Barker join J. Alexander and Tyra Banks on the judges' panel for elimination.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The women head to Toronto for fashion week where they must go on castings to book modelling jobs.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The women are mentored by America's Next Top Model All-Star winner Lisa D' Amato as they are divided into teams to create and record music videos.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The models are tasked with creating a PSA with some young girls for an anti-bullying campaign, where the winners of the challenge will receive a personal video message from a loved one.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The models go to castings for the opportunity to open a fashion show for one of the Dorchester Collection Fashion Prize finalists with fashion's elite.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The final six women head to Macau, where they get a reading from an astrologer and are challenged with re-creating their auras through fashion and beauty.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The models are challenged with having to learn a fight sequence and act in a scene with Nicholas Tse, international actor, and pop star.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 11
programme.desc: The models make their way through Hong Kong to attend go-sees, where one of the women loses her confidence and crumbles under the pressure.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The final models participate in their Covergirl commercial and photo shoot, where one of the women has a panic attack and is taken to the hospital.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Rewind and review the challenges, photo shoots and dramatic personalities that make up the British Invasion cycle of Top Model.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S15 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The High Fashion Cycle Kicks Off With A Party Hosted By Designer Cynthia Rowley.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S15 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Fashion Designer Diane Von Furstenberg Is The Guest Judge; Teen Star Demi Lovato Visits The Girls.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S15 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Fashion Designer Patricia Field (Sex And The City) Is The Guest Judge; Plus The Girls Receive Makeovers.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S15 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Top Beauty Photographer Matthew Rolston Is This Week’S Photographer And Guest Judge.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S15 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Supermodel Karolina Kurkova Is The Guest Judge.
