programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 58
programme.desc: Back in the MasterChef kitchen following their Tasmanian adventure, contestants learn that the winner of today's two round immunity challenge will be fast-tracked straight through to the Semi-Final.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 59
programme.desc: It's time for some fun in MasterClass. The tables are turned as Jock and Andy go head-to-head in a pub meal invention test, before engaging in a three-course menu battle against our four finalists.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 60
programme.desc: Peter Gilmore has created some of the most famed and punishing pressure tests in MasterChef history, For a spot in the semi finals, contestants must simultaneously cook two of his most complex dishes.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 61
programme.desc: Shannon Bennett is back for the semi final, running the pass and offering advice. Contetants must create a three-course menu worthy of a place in the Finale for 20 diners each plus the judges.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 62
programme.desc: Welcome to the Grand Final! Our two gifted finalists enter the kitchen for the last time and they'll have to impress Heston Blumenthal and our judges to win the title of MasterChef 2022 and $250,000!

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Hosted by Sarah Wilson, MasterChef Australia gives budding chefs the ultimate once in a lifetime opportunity to develop their cooking skills, get mentored by the best, & ultimately change their lives. Tonight, auditions are held in Sydney & Adelaide.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Auditions move first to Brisbane tonight, where Queensland's hopefuls put their best dish forward. Then in Perth, where there are more restaurants per head than in any other Australian city, the judges are hoping to be bowled over.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Melbourne, the food capital of Australia is the last stop on the nationwide tour before the Top 50 are selected, and the competition moves to Sydney for three days of intense cooking challenges.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tonight the bottom twelve have just 45 minutes to invent a dish that will wow the judges. The pressure hits one contestant who crumbles with nerves and can't even select ingredients.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The bottom group find themselves at Sydney's famous fish markets for a high octane challenge against the clock. With just two hours to shop, get back to the kitchen and cook a two course seafood meal, the pace is fast and furious for the contestants.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: After a tough week those that remain in the Top 50 have one last challenge to prove their worth. Each contestant has a box of ten mystery ingredients including pork, chocolate, bread and cabbage and just 30 minutes to prepare a judge worthy dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Arriving in Sydney, the contestants are taken to their luxury $16M pad and immediately into the MasterChef kitchen. Put straight to task, the Top 20 are given a set of ingredients and have just one hour to whip up a chicken dish of their choice.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Fresh from the first challenge win, one contestant gets the opportunity to compete against a celebrity chef. Both Chef's make the same dish and the judges will blind taste each. If the contestant makes a 'better' dish, they will fastrack to the finals.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Tonight, both teams are challenged to run their own Sushi train, serving real paying customers. They are responsible for everything, from creating the delicate dishes, to drumming up business and making sure their respective patrons are happy.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The losing team from last night's challenge must deliberate on their weakest member. Assessing each other's performances during challenges and judging each other on teamwork, the contestants must decide who will be the first to leave MasterChef Australia.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Resident judges Gary Mehigan and George Calombaris give the contestants a chance to learn from the best and see how it's really done in the weekly Masterclass.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The 19 remaining contestants receive a shock announcement from one of their number that reinforces the pressure they are all under in their bid to win. Missing home, one contestant has decided to abandon his restaurant dream and return home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Apple tarte tatin is the order of the day as the three bottom chef's from last night compete in a frantic cook-off to stay in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Tonight, the Executive Chef of Longrain Restaurant in Sydney competes against one contestant in creating a Thai salad. After the judges have blind tasted each dish, should the MasterChef contestant be picked as the winner, a place in the final awaits.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Taken to the exclusive Sydney Vaucluse Yacht club, the contestants are divided into two teams and told they have $500 to plan, make, and serve a banquet for ten people.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 16
programme.desc: The losing team from the Off Site challenge must select which member must leave. With just an hour to talk through their decision it looks like the team leader might become the fall guy.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Friday night is Master Class night, and George and Gary are cooking up a storm. They revisit the week's challenges, and offer their take on how the contestants might have faired better. The tips fly fast and furious as the experts reveal their secrets.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Tonight, the competitors face two back to back challenges. First, the mystery box, in which all have just half an hour to create a spectacular dish from unknown ingredients. Then, the winner decides upon a Chinese style for the invention challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 19
programme.desc: The three weakest performers from last night cook off to stay in the competition. Each must cook the same dish - stuffed squid. None have cooked such an intricate dish before, and are soon buckling under the pressure.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Tonight, the winner of Sunday night's Invention Challenge gets a chance to advance through to the final week of the competition with tonight's Celebrity Chef Challenge. But standing in the way is chef, television presenter and restaurateur, Peter Evans.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Tonight the competitors are divided into red & blue teams, led by Gary and George. They head to the supermarket to choose ingredients for a 3-course meal, but the catch is: each team is only allowed to shop from 3 randomly assigned supermarket aisles

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: In this episode, will Nanny Pat like her makeover? Can Lauren accept her boss’s offer? Will sparks fly on Amy’s date? And can LOLA give the performance to make their dreams come true?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: In this last episode of the Only Way Is Essex, all roads lead to Romford for the big showdown. Yes it’s Mark’s boxing event and he’s thrown down the gauntlet to Kirk.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Amy introduces her new client Chloe to the group where Mark encourages her little cousin Joey to make a move with Lucy.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Will Arg and Lydia ever move in together? Or will it be Lydia’s mum Debbie or Arg himself who puts the breaks on it? We see just how painful a break up can be for Lauren.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Amy is on the lookout for a new assistant, but will see find anyone suitably glamorous enough? Kirk’s in a dilemma, but which way will he go? And Arg is on a mission, but is it a road to nowhere?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Will Amy’s new assistant Paloma make the right impression at the salon? Newly single Kirk throws a party, but who will take centre stage? And will Lauren’s culinary skills hit the mark when the Wrights descend for dinner?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Just as Joey is about to bite the bullet and ask out Lucy, he sees her flirting with Kirk instead leaving both him and Chloe confused.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Joey is still torn between Lucy and Sam and is determined to ask one of them out at Harry’s 17th birthday party.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Lauren G is raging when Mark suggests to her he starts a modelling agency and tries anything to mark her stamp on him.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Mark and Lauren G attend a wedding fair where it’s clear they both have very different ideas of the type of wedding they want.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The day of Mark and Lauren G’s big engagement party arrives and the guests are shocked at the scale of it comparing it to an actual wedding.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Joey has a proposition for Mick as he plans to be the face of one of the nights at Sugarhut

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Mark thinks of a way of taking Arg’s mind off of Lydia so plans a game of tennis doubles with him.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Lydia starts to wonder if Amy is the girl in the rumor who slept with Arg but Debbie assures her otherwise

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: With Joey now taking over Essex with his club nights, Mark is determined to get back on the scene and reclaim his title.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Lauren G is infuriated to discover she isn’t invited to Mark’s pool party in case she makes the female guests feel uncomfortable.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It is Jess’ 26th birthday party, which bring together new faces and old flames under the same roof

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Joey, Lydia and Debbie head to the local car boot sale to see if they can get any items for Lydia's new shop.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Lauren P, Lauren G and Maria meet for a birthday breakfast. Mark and Mario cross paths at the gym. Mick and Kirk talk women post singles’ night…. Mick reveals he likes Maria.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Maria and Mick finally get friendly over a romantic dinner date. The twins model for Jess and show off their assets. Lucy shows off her curves. And Mario and Mark lock horns.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tension rises with Maria and Gemma over Mick. Mario turns up the heat on Lucy with a proposition but will it all go horribly wrong. Mark and Mario face up once again with Mark having a killer ace up his sleeve.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Gemma and Frankie reveal their body concerns in a moving heart to heart. Joey gives Kirk some interesting fashion tips. And a smashing time is had by all when the twins hold “Greek Night”

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Gemma takes Harry under her wing-mirror as she teaches Harry to drive. No bum notes for Chloe with her first consultation for her bottom implants. And Kirk hosts Karaoke night at the Sugar Hut ……with screaming success!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Joey hosts an unusual cockney/ animal themed party. Mario and Lucy cozy up and there's fun on the slopes!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Cara and Billi get ready for a night out on the town….Kirk and Joey style! Mark woos Sam and Mario show Lucy his Italian side.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Sam gets her feet under the Wright's family table during a cosy Sunday lunch and Arg tackles his body issues full on starting with his gnashers!|Mick and Kirk spend some quality father/son time bonding during a fishing trip.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Lucy wonders whether she’s made a big mistake by giving Mario a free pass. Sam gets a surprise visitor and Mark, Jess, Gemma and Arg head to Boot Camp for fat-busting workouts and some intimate revelations!!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Lydia finds out what happens at Bootcamp doesn’t necessarily stay at Bootcamp. Everyone gets in the ghoulish spirit for Halloween. Nanny Pat goes trick or treating and Sam and Billie host an action packed party.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: It's the morning after the night before and Lauren G and Sam are both reacting to "that kiss"

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: In the season finale: Arg continues his quest for physical perfection and seeks fashion advice from none other than Mr Essex himself, Joey, with "interesting" results!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Frankie, Lauren Pope and Chloe discuss the highly topical PIP implants. Lauren reveals to the girls she has them. There's a new girl on the block that arrives with attitude and 'history'.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mario turns to his dad for some relationship advice as Lucy sheds tears. Jess and Gemma tap into their spiritual side. Lauren Pope spills the beans on a past royal relationship. Joey holds a poker night for Mick, Diags, Gemma, Mario, Chloe and Frankie.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Joey and Diags attempt to cheer up Arg with a surprise outing, roller-skating in the park. Gemma celebrates her 31st birthday in true Essex style with a Hollywood themed party.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Joey and Diags persuade Lauren Pope and Georgina to go on a night out, Joey and Diags-style. Diags gets a crash course in personal grooming from the best in the business, Chloe Sims and she reveals her secret weapon in battling acne, nappy rash cream.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 507
programme.desc: The gang return from Barcelona with Charlotte's declaration of love for Gary still hanging in the air and Vicky set for a final showdown with Ricci (S5, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 508
programme.desc: With the gang cooling off after the biggest fight in the show's history, there's an icy atmosphere between the boys and the girls as they're off to the Alps for their final Geordie Tour (S5, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 601
programme.desc: Holly and James still haven't put their differences behind them and are a war zone waiting to happen, Gary and Scott are on a mission to pull every girl in Sydney. (S6, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 602
programme.desc: The group are in high spirits as they get a surprise visit from Jay. Charlotte is still coming to terms with her feelings for Gaz. James' battle with Holly is set to continue. (S6, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 603
programme.desc: James and Gaz come to blows over pulling and Gaz is forced to leave the house. Vicky tashes on and Holly gets up close and personal with the one and only Scotty T. (S6, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 604
programme.desc: Whilst the fittest guy in Australia sends the girls into a spin, Scotty and Gaz square up as nightclubbing gets nasty. House destruction sees Gary head into the bush. (S6, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 605
programme.desc: An anger management session is arranged for the group, and Charlotte lets out all her negative feelings towards Gaz. Sophie and Joel gets too drunk and embarrass the group on a night out. (S6, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 606
programme.desc: With Charlotte returning from the Bush a new woman, the housemates lay down the law for Scotty, slapping him with a drinking ban hoping that he will stop smashing up the house. (S6, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 607
programme.desc: James and Gary come to blows which sends shockwaves through the house and Charlotte's heart strings are pulled for Gary as she offers him support. (S6 ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 608
programme.desc: As their time in Sydney comes to an end, the singles make it their mission to have a storming night in the Whitsundays. The coupled housemates have raised suspicions. Last in the series. (S6, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 701
programme.desc: The Geordies are back where they belong, in Newcastle, for a jaw-dropping summer season of partying, pulling, bucking, necking on and getting mortal. (S7, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 702
programme.desc: The Geordies are reeling from an explosive fallout following new girl Marnie's arrival. A night out ends with Scott completely losing his cool and trying to smash the house up. (S7, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 703
programme.desc: It is Holly's birthday, the Geordies celebrate as only they know how - with a mint house party. Meanwhile there's a tiny tragedy in the house, leading to an unexpected funeral on the beach. (S7, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 704
programme.desc: The house is rocked to the core as Charlotte and Holly have an explosive falling out with new girl Marnie. Scott and Gary's friendship is pushed to the limit. A former housemate returns. (S7, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 706
programme.desc: Gary and Holly are still furious at the way Charlotte's boyfriend treated her. Marnie decides she'll put out if Scott behaves himself. (S7, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 801
programme.desc: The Geordies are back in the Toon for more partying, necking on and getting mortal. Everyone's buzzin' as a new lad arrives to join the crew and Marnie promises to stay away from the boys. (S8, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 802
programme.desc: Gary gets jealous when Marnie flirts with new boy Aaron. Vicky returns to the house, and there's the first ever Tash-On Tours as the Geordies put their own spin on singles nights. (S8, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 803
programme.desc: Charlotte's back! And her arrival couldn't have come at a worse time. New lad Aaron wins a date with Holly after her challenge, but he reveals he's actually got a thing for Vicky. (S8, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 804
programme.desc: With Charlotte back in the house, all eyes are on Gary and Marnie and whether they'll decide to continue sleeping together. (S8, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 805
programme.desc: Things kick off in the house as Aaron hears Vicky and the girls slagging him off on the eve of his third date with Vicky. (S8,ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 806
programme.desc: New boy Kyle gets properly settled into the house by spending the night with Holly, and the Geordies take Tash on Tours international as they jet off to Reykjavik, Iceland for some partying. (S8, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 807
programme.desc: After checking out the local guys, girls and geysers in Iceland, the Geordies head back to the Toon, where it all kicks off as Aaron and Scott find out the truth about Gary and Marnie. (S8, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 808
programme.desc: Will Aaron and Marnie finally get together, and will Scott and Gary make up? Meanwhile, Charlotte and Holly announce Geordie Shore's first-ever wedding. (S8, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 901
programme.desc: Buzzin'! Our favourite party animals are back! Everyone is shocked when Vicky gets a promotion and becomes their boss. Holly tries to stay classy by not jumping into bed with Kyle. (S9, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 902
programme.desc: Holly has a house party but there's a massive kick-off between the lads when Marnie tries to make Aaron jealous by necking on with Kyle. (S9, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 903
programme.desc: The Geordies head to Paris for a Tash-on Tours job. Vicky gets unprofessionally mortal at work, and, on returning to the Toon, Charlotte leaves for crisis talks with her boyfriend. (S9, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 904
programme.desc: Charlotte and Gary find themselves gravitating together after she returns from a showdown with her boyfriend. Vicky struggles to convince Marnie to take work seriously. (S9, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 906
programme.desc: The Geordies hit the road to host a Tash-On Tours hoedown for young farmers in Gloucestershire. \"Psycho\" Charlotte is back when she sees Gary talking to another girl. (S9, ep6)

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: It's spring break in Cabo and anything can happen, especially since LC, Stephen and Kristin are staying in the same hotel. Kristin's wild partying at a club prompts a fight with Stephen, opening the door for him to hook back up with LC.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: After the craziness of Cabo, Kristin invites Stephen to a Blink 182 concert with the hopes of getting back together. LC, Lo, Trey and Dieter also hit the show and when an outsider insults LC and Lo's character, Trey steps up in their defense.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: It's prom time, and while everyone is caught up with who's going with whom, which pair of Charles David shoes look best with their dress, and how to fit everyone in the stretch Hummer-limo, Kristin's biggest concern is a drama-free night with Stephen.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The seniors charter a yacht to Catalina, but Lo skips out, leaving LC without a buddy to survive camping, kayaking, and Stephen and Kristin's incessant cuddling.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Graduation day is here and the seniors spend time with their families getting ready for the big event. Through a Senior Video Project, the seniors reveal their personal thoughts on graduation, senior year, and life after Laguna.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Free from school, the gang lives up their last summer together, but when they gather for a final barbeque at Trey's house, the reality of leaving Laguna and each other starts to sink in.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: In the final days before leaving Laguna, Stephen must tie up loose ends, first saying goodbye to Trey, then the surf shop, and finally Kristin. Luckily there's one person he won't have to part with.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It's Christmas break in Laguna Beach. Kristin has ruled the school, LC is leaving San Francisco and the drama is all around.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Love and Laguna Beach mix like chocolate and onions. Things with Stephen and Kristin are dunzo, but what about him and LC? And rumors about Jason and Alex M abound.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: It's B-day time in LB for both Kristen and LC. Kristen and Talan flirt up a storm, while old feelings stir between Stephen and LC at her party south of the border.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Jason and Talan stir up all kinds of trouble when their eyes start to wander from their girlfriends Jessica and Taylor.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: It's time to suit up for the LB Winter Formal and nothing causes more drama than a girl asks boy dance. Drama is what Jason gets when he goes with Alex M not Jessica.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Valentine's Day brings nothing but trouble for Jessica who's still desperately hanging on to Jason (whose heart is clearly elsewhere).

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The LB hotties head from the beach to the slopes to cheer up Jessica after Jason calls them dunzo.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The Jessica, Jason and Alex M. love triangle continues to get complicated when Alex finds out that Jessica and Jason have been hooking up again behind her back.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The gang heads south of the border to Cabo and things get super spicy when Alex confronts Jessica about hooking up with Jason and the two nearly come to blows.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Things get tricky when Talan professes his love to Kristen shortly before Stephen does the same.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Kristen hooks up with Jessica's new crush. Stephen and LC share a moment in San Fran.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: It's prom time again at LB and the usual hijinx are in full force. Kristin still has no date. Will Talan swoop in and take her, or is it stag city for the blonde bombshell?

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: LC decides it's time to do what she does best and throw a poolside BBQ. Kristin reluctantly shows up briefly, and Stephen idly watches as Jason steals LC's heart.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: The time has finally come for the gang to graduate high school and leave their LB bubble... mixed emotions run high and the tears start rolling.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Jason kisses Jessica and gets busted by LC. Look out!

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: LC throws another party and after his moronic actions at the benefit. Jason comes crawling back to apologize, but he can't even do that well.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: It's the end of the summer, and the time has come for everybody to leave beautiful Laguna Beach. The cast must come to terms with where their lives will go from here.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It is a new year with a new cast and the drama starts right away in Laguna Beach. Tessa is invited to queen bee Kyndra's BBQ, but when Tessa brings her best friend Raquel, it's clear they are both unwanted guests.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Rocky throws Tessa a surprise birthday party but it's Chase who delivers Tessa the best present. Meanwhile, the Kyndra/Cameron relationship heats up behind Jessica's back.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Christmas in Laguna heats up when Kyndra and Cami crash Rocky's holiday party. Meanwhile, Cameron gets defensive about his relationship with Jessica.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Breanna reaches out to her former best friend Raquel in hopes to repair their relationship, but things don't go smoothly. Meanwhile, Chase arranges for a double date so his pal Kelan can go after his long-time crush, Lexie.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When Tessa and Rocky travel to San Diego for a modeling gig for Tessa, Cameron decides to tag along. Sparks fly between him and Tessa, but will Jessica find out?

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: It's Cameron's birthday but it's Tessa who is surprised when she realizes that Cameron has a totally different take on their hookup. Meanwhile, Kyndra rekindles her rocky romance with her ex-boyfriend, Tyler.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Kyndra risks her relationship with Tyler when she gets a little too cozy with Cameron at Winter Formal. Will she be able to convince everyone nothing happened including Tyler's little sister, Nikki, before she tells?

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Kyndra tries to calm the rumor mill by hosting a Valentine's Day dinner party with Tyler, but tensions flare when Cameron shows up. Meanwhile, Rocky takes it to another level with Alex on their romantic night out.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Tessa goes on a date with Derek, one of the popular guys, while Cameron and Jessica's relationship is on its last legs.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Things get heated at the bonfire when Alex and Rocky determine the fate of their relationship.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Alex and Rocky have broken up, but rough times are still ahead, plus Tessa tries to get Derek to open up about their relationship.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The entire crew from Laguna heads down to Cabo San Lucas for spring break; whatever happens in Cabo, stays in Cabo.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: With prom just around the corner, Alex decides that he made a huge mistake when he broke up with Rocky.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Open Air Stereo gives the performance of a lifetime and Rocky and Tessa snuggle up with old boyfriends.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: It's graduation time and the seniors are getting ready to head to college, while the remaining juniors start to think about their senior year.

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 101
programme.desc: Charlotte hears news on social media that brings back painful memories. Focussing on the future, she turns her attention to new man Josh and trying to fix her relationship with BFF Melissa. (S1, ep1)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Charlotte heads out to Australia with BFF Melissa. With the rules agreed, Charlotte is confident she can trust Josh while she's away, but on a night out she makes a terrible mistake. (S1, ep2)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 103
programme.desc: Charlotte's keen to put last week's drunken mistake behind her, but will Josh forgive her for locking lips with someone else? Meanwhile, Charlotte plans a surprise party for her Dad's 50th. (S1, ep3)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 104
programme.desc: Charlotte tries to take her relationship with Josh to the next level by meeting his friends, but her world is sent into a spin when she finds out that her ex Stephen is back in the UK. (S1, ep4)

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Dave Rife, White Castle owner and grandson of the founder, goes undercover in the family business.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: COO of Churchill Downs, Bill Carstanjan, faces his fear of horses head-on to go undercover in his own company.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Michael Rubin, one of America's youngest CEOs, goes undercover in the billion-dollar e-commerce company that he founded.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Joel Manby, a boss who recently turned his life around, goes undercover in his nationwide theme park and amusement company.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: President and COO Rick Arquilla goes undercover in the largest plumbing and drain cleaning company in North America.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Chris McCann, President and COO of America's largest florist and online gift shops, goes undercover.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Steve Joyce hits the frontlines of his own company, which includes such popular hotel franchises as Comfort Inn, Econo Lodge, Quality and Cambria Suites, and receives an exhausting, up-close look at the industry.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Kim Schaefer, CEO of Great Wolf Resorts, North America's largest family of indoor waterpark resorts, struggles to keep pace working in an aquatic center and gets her hands dirty when she responds to a call no waterpark employee wants to receive.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Mike White, Chairman, President and CEO of DIRECTV, the world's most popular video service goes undercover in his own company where he discovers that employees are spending their own money for a specific piece of equipment.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Bryan Bedford, Chairman of the Board, President and CEO of Frontier Airlines, goes undercover in his own company, where he "gets christened" while emptying a plane's lavatory and discovers how company-wide pay cuts are impacting his employees.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Steve Phelps, SVP and Chief Marketing Officer for NASCAR, the #1 spectator sport in the U.S., goes undercover with one of the sport's pit crews and also struggles to keep pace working alongside a grounds crew preparing for the "Daytona 500."

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Fernando Aguirre, Chairman and CEO of Chiquita, one of the largest producers of fruits and vegetables in the world, is unable to perform a physically demanding job at their flagship factory and has to be removed from the line.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Todd Ricketts, one of the owners of the Chicago Cubs, goes undercover within one of baseball's most famous franchises and fights for the chance to redeem himself after being let go on the second day.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Steven Foster, Co-Founder and CEO of Lucky Strike Lanes, one of the nation's largest chains of upscale bowling alleys, takes an emotional trip inside his own company where among other things, he hits the streets as a walking bowling pin.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Don Fertman, the Chief Development Officer for SUBWAY restaurants, one of the world's largest food franchises, goes undercover where he learns endless sandwich combinations while being trained by one of the toughest, no-nonsense employees ever.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Henrik Slipsager, President and CEO of ABM Industries, one of the nation's largest facilities services contractors, offering janitorial, engineering, parking and security services for thousands of clients, takes a journey within his own corporation.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: John Fuller, President and CEO of Johnny Rockets, one of the nation's largest chains of retro-themed restaurants, goes undercover to work in a restaurant for the first time in his career.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Kevin Sheehan, President and CEO of Norwegian Cruise Line, finds himself in uncharted territory when he's asked to lead nearly 1,000 party-goers in a line dance, and is later forced to reveal his true identity after being recognized by an employee.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Ronald Croatti, President and CEO of UniFirst, one of the nation's largest producers of workwear and uniforms, dons a "hippie" look during his undercover mission, where he finds himself struggling to keep pace with the fast-moving assembly line.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Sheldon Yellen, the CEO of BELFOR, the world's largest disaster restoration company, goes undercover and becomes frustrated while struggling to hang drywall. Also, the boss unexpectedly reveals himself while working alongside an employee.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Denny Slagle, President and CEO of Mack Trucks, the second largest manufacturer of heavy-duty trucks in the world, goes undercover and brings the plant's assembly line to a halt, and hears rumors that Mack is moving its operations to Mexico.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: The mayor of Cincinnati, Mark Mallory, becomes the first elected official to go undercover as a municipal employee, working as a mechanic repairing public transportation vehicles and a sanitation worker.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Rich McClure, CEO of United Van Lines, the nation's largest moving company, asks his wife to assist him during one of his undercover jobs. And the boss' moving team fears he won't make it through the physically demanding process of an entire move.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Scott Sibella, President and COO of the MGM Grand in Las Vegas, goes undercover within the walls of the second-largest hotel in the world and faces a group of rowdy gamblers who are quick to point out his shortcomings as a dealer.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Bill Massa, President and CEO of Synagro, the nation's largest waste water treatment corporation, goes undercover in the series' dirtiest mission to date and finds himself cleaning a tank of 27-year-old sludge.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 20
programme.desc: David Kim, CEO of Baja Fresh, one of the nation's largest restaurant chains, takes matters into his own hands when he encounters a problem at one of his stores. And after his emotional undercover mission, delivers some shocking news to his boardroom.

These Deadly Women, once a vision in white, become their husbands blackest hour when murder is their escape from an ‘Inconvenient Marriage’.

programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The FBI Files S1 Ep. 10

programme.title: The FBI Files S3 Ep. 42

programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.desc: It's everyone's worst nightmare  eaten alive by a shark. But how likely is this to happen? Riley is out to debunk the myths about shark attacks. He will be giving us clear instructions on what to do and how to stay safe when confronted by a shark.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: It is a snake snack-o-rama. Johnny and Julia rescue a pet budgie before its too late. Johnny wrangles another python. And the both of them welcome a new member to the snake catching team.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Julia grapples with a massive python, before encountering a lightning fast whip snake and visiting a hospital to talk snake bites.

programme.title: Human Prey S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: While diving for shellfish off Cape Howe, an Australian man ends up inside the jaws of a Great White shark. Determined to maintain his championship spear fishing title, an Australian man inadvertently becomes bait for a 15-foot-long Great White shark.

programme.title: Ocean Predators S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: On their own in the Pacific Ocean are the Chatham Islands: wild, remote, and circled by a population of great white sharks.

programme.title: Ocean Predators S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In pristine waters, in one of the most remote locations on earth, lives a mysterious species of shark.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Julia confronts her fear on heights while trying to wrangle a massive carpet python. Meanwhile, Johnny Must try to catch two of them. Later Julia has a close call with the worlds second deadliest snake.

programme.title: Human Prey S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: While on the job at an Florida golf club, an experienced golf ball diver is attacked by a territorial, 400-pound alligator. Jeff Tanswell's snorkeling trip turns into a bloody battle for his life when he is dragged under by an 12-foot saltwater crocodile.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Julia teams up with a terrier to track down a suspected deadly intruder. Meanwhile, she rescues Bob from a tetchy python, and comes up with a great marketing idea.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Johnny Gets trapped in a tight spot with an unhappy snake. Julia finds herself in a very precarious battle with a python. And finally a bitter sweet visit to the RSPCA.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: It is a snake snack-o-rama. Johnny and Julia rescue a pet budgie before its too late. Johnny wrangles another python. And the both of them welcome a new member to the snake catching team.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Pauanui Beach has been closed due to sharks. What type of shark are they and what are they doing here? Riley is on a mission to find out. Once the species has been identified Riley sets about catching and tagging them.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Johnny has one stinker of a day and Julia teaches us a few things about owning and caring for a lizard before dealing with a deadly trespasser.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Riley Elliott is off to the Bay of Islands to attach the first of his high tech satellite transmitters for the season. He won't just be on the boat however, he plans to get into the water and hand feed the Blues.

programme.title: Ocean Predators S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In the waters off New Zealand, host Kina Scollay leaps into the water with a pod of orca. Watching his back is Ingrid Visser, world renowned orca expert.

programme.title: When Shark Meets Croc
programme.desc: The aggressive ocean predator, the bull shark, is venturing up the rivers of Africa's coast. But lurking here is a deadly killer: the Nile crocodile.

programme.title: The Royal Bake Off
programme.desc: Allie and Marily are rivals in the small town of Meadow Ridge, their bakeries across the street from each other. Their rivalry intensifies when the Royal Prince of Samavia rolls into town looking for a royal baker for his brother’s coronation. When Allie and the Royal Prince hit it off, it seems he might be in the market for more than just a terrific cake. But will the sneaky Marilyn let Allie get it all: the gig and the prince? Of course not.

programme.title: Love Is A Piece Of Cake
programme.desc: Jessie's a third generation baker who loves her cake shop more than anything in the world. When developers threaten to buy her building and force her out, she must do all she can to save her bakery.

programme.title: Love on Harbor Island
programme.desc: Interior designer Lily returns home to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast when she meets Marcus, a handsome seaplane pilot.

programme.title: Love's Second Chance
programme.desc: When Rose returns home to inherit her grandmother’s dress shop, she runs into her high school crush, Cole. They soon realize that just like the shop, their love deserves a second chance as well.

programme.title: Starting Up Love
programme.desc: Jillian inherits a beautiful mountainside cabin after her long-lost, wealthy uncle dies. She plans to sell it, but handsome caretaker Liam makes her an offer she can’t refuse, and sparks fly as they work to transform the cabin into a holiday resort.

programme.title: The Baby Proposal
programme.desc: Layla has it all figured out, a thriving career and a loving fiance. She co-hosts Wake Up Chicago with Derek. Sparks begin to fly between them when they become the unexpected guardians of a baby.

programme.title: 10 Truths About Love
programme.desc: Hannah, a romance columnist, thinks she's got life and love figured out until her boyfriend unexpectedly breaks up with her. Her editor hires a new writer to collaborate on her column and sparks fly.

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A novelist falls in love with a retired Navy SEAL while writing her newest book.

programme.title: Cooking with Love
programme.desc: Hardworking and optimistic television producer, Kelly, doesn't have time for love. Along with her mentor Amanda, Kelly dives into another season of the Little Gourmet, a kids cooking show.

programme.title: A Match in Manhattan
programme.desc: When Celeste loses her job as a teacher, her boss puts her forward for an au pair job with a NY Property Tycoon. As she struggles with the children, can Celeste win over Richard and his children so she can keep her job, or maybe love has other plans...

programme.title: Calling for Love
programme.desc: Podcast host Samantha has an aversion to romance but is assigned to host a show that reunites lost loves. She then falls for charming Jake, who calls in with a problem she is determined to solve.

programme.title: For the Love of Lily
programme.desc: A career-minded city girl must build a rooftop garden with an old-school country boy to appease her boss's new passion for 'green' living and secure her promotion. But love may be in bloom.

programme.title: From Italy with Amore
programme.desc: When Ariel sees her dream man, she will stop at nothing to get to know him better. In her quest to see him again, she meets restaurateur Daniel, who shows her that food is the way to her heart.

programme.title: Love at the Bootcamp
programme.desc: When a scattered marketing exec is tasked with helping an unpopular small-town bootcamp turn its image around, she finds that the strict, regimented ways of its owner might just be the perfect 'fit' for love.

programme.title: The Boxer and the Butterfly
programme.desc: When an aspiring dancer is dropped by her partner days before her big performance, she'll need to teach a down-and-out boxer some moves to win the prize money and open her dream dance studio.

programme.title: Scream 4
programme.desc: Ghostface returns to Woodsboro – but it’s a new decade, with new rules.

programme.title: No One Could Protect Her
programme.desc: Jessica experiences a woman's worst nightmare when she barely survives a killer's entry into her home.

programme.title: The Courageous Heart of Irena Sendler
programme.desc: The story of a social worker who was arrested by the Nazis for saving nearly 2,500 Jewish children.

programme.title: The Good Father: The Martin MacNeill Story
programme.desc: Weeks after his wife's death, a doctor moves in his mistress. His daughter begins to question everything.

programme.title: View of Terror
programme.desc: A stalker picks up the scent of a beautiful young woman.

programme.title: The Great Martian War
programme.desc: Paying homage to “War of the Worlds,” The Great Martian War is a larger-than-life event that never happened.

programme.title: Soul Survivors
programme.desc: A freshman has a horrible car accident and finds herself trapped in a twilight world between life and death.

programme.title: Europa Report
programme.desc: A crew of international astronauts are sent on a private mission to Jupiter's fourth moon.

programme.title: Shanghai
programme.desc: An American expat returns to Shanghai in the months before Pearl Harbor due to the death of his friend.

programme.title: The Mist
programme.desc: A storm unleashes bloodthirsty creatures on a small town, where a band of citizens hole up in a supermarket.

programme.title: Lost River
programme.desc: Billy is led into a macabre underworld in her quest to save her childhood home and hold her family together.

programme.title: Official Secrets
programme.desc: A whistleblower leaks info on an NSA operation designed to push the UN into sanctioning the invasion of Iraq.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 997
programme.desc: Dora's Dance to the Rescue: Put on your dancing shoes, because Dora needs you to spin, shake wiggle, jump and clap with her as she tries to rescue Swiper the fox, who's been trapped inside a bottle by a mean dancing elf.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Dora's Great Roller Skate Adventure: Dora and Boots put on their roller skates and take off on a skating adventure to stand up to a bully named Big Wheeler and open Skate Park for everyone.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Dora's and Sparky's Riding Adventure!: After helping Sparky the horse feel better, Dora goes on one more ride with him before bringing him back to the barn.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Dora and Boots rush to take Dora's friend, Night Light, to the Library before it gets too dark for the little chickens' special story time.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: The girls help Layla, the Ice Genie, create fun snow decorations for the upcoming Frosty Fun Festival. / The kids hold a fun sports competition for their pets, Nazboo, and his siblings.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Today's Benny's Sing-Along Party where Dora and Benny are going to sing a very special song together! C'mon, let's all sing-along!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Gabby has the perfect tool to get Blaze ready to race: a special remote that can control any machine. But when Crusher takes her remote, he activates machines all over town to slow Blaze down.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The girls visit the Glitter Genie to learn glitter magic, but something is causing Shimmer to keep messing up. / The girls visit the Gem Princess, who takes them underwater to help gather crystals in the beautiful coral reef.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 19
programme.desc: When Leah accidentally lets a goat out of its pen at the petting zoo, she calls on Shimmer and Shine to help get him back. The girls and pets are led on a farmland adventure in pursuit of the escaped goat.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 26
programme.desc: When Zeta and Nazboo get zkunked by a smelly Zahramay zkunk, Shimmer, Shine and Leah try to help them get un-stinky. Zeta teams up with Shimmer, Shine, Leah and Princess Samira to stop Uzma from taking all the magic from Zahramay Falls.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: When Zeta gets hold of a magical painting gem, she creates lots of troublesome art that the girls must get under control. When Leah accidentally wishes for the day to last forever, the kids must find a way to make the moon come up to end the day.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 20

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 12

programme.desc: Dora and Boots take a rainbow butterfly, Mariposa, to the Butterfly Ball where everybody gets to have wings.

programme.desc: Andy at the Umi City Airport is on the plane with his family and can't wait to go on his first trip to the beach. But the plane can't take off, and everything is going wrong!

programme.desc: A large worm is terrorising Bikini Bottom in 'Sandy, SpongeBob, And The Worm', while in 'Squid On Strike', Squidward and SpongeBob go on strike from the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 49

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 51
programme.desc: Spongebob decides to throw a big party after discovering a "how to throw a party" kit in the grocery store.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 52
programme.desc: To make some extra cash, Spongebob and Patrick decide to sell chocolate door to door./Barnacle Boy wants to be called "Barnacle Man" and rebels when everyone rejects his request.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 53
programme.desc: Patrick joins Ms. Puff's class but begins to get Spongebob in a lot of trouble causing him to lose gold stars./Mr. Krabs takes Spongebob and Squidward on a clam fishing trip.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 54
programme.desc: It is prehistoric Bikini Bottom, and we spend a day in the life of SpongeGar, Patar, and Squog. (Spongebob, Patrick, and Squidward's prehistoric alter-egos.)

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 56
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs gets ill after eating an old Krabby Patty that he refused to throw away./SpongeBob has an accident while sand sledding! Afraid for his safety, he won't leave his house.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 57
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs aims to squeeze every penny out of kids on summer break by building a playground in the Krusty Krab./SpongeBob and Patrick lure Squidward to their backyard campout.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 58
programme.desc: Spongebob desperately searches for his missing name tag./Plankton enlists his relatives to help him steal the Krabby Patty Secret Formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 59

programme.desc: After failing miserably on a game show for 6th graders, Dad admits he dropped out of school in the 5th grade. The next thing Timmy knows, Dad’s in his class!

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Goldie-Crocks and the Three Fair Bears/Fancy Schmancy: Yet another Squirrely Scout camping trip goes bad when Mr. Crocker and the Fair Bears show up.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Jerk of All Trades/Snack Attack: Timmy gets Jorgen fired. He helps Jorgen find a new job. Sparky makes his own magic dog treats. Crocker tries to buy one million of them in order to make a wish.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The forest is invaded by the beavers' enemies, lumberjacks. These guys just don't cut down trees, they sing, as well!

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Otto's snowboard gets mangled before a competition, smooth-talking, two-faced Snomart rep Dick Shackley offers Ottos a corporate sponsorship.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 48
programme.desc: Arnold lends Sid his room for one evening, but the arrangement backfires when Sid keeps on borrowing the room. / Helga and Patty (the big girl) face off.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 13
programme.desc: When Timmy gripes that being Mom is easier than being a kid, Wanda takes the bait and switches their brains. Now Mom is Timmy, and Timmy is Mom!

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When Ocean Shores is overrun with shoobies'

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Timmy borrows Mark Chang’s Fake-i-fier in order to attend Trixie’s costume party. Unfortunately, he knows nothing about Yugopotamian technology and soon the device is causing Timmy to turn into all sorts of crazy creatures.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Helga's Boyfriend/Crush on Teacher: Helga hatches a plan to "hire" Stinky, (by bribing him with candy bars), to act as her boyfriend in hopes of making Arnold jealous.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S8 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Timmy Turner is an average kid - sort of. He's an only child with oblivious parents. But luckily he has Cosmo and Wanda, his wacky fairy godparents who help him hide from evil babysitters, do homework and much more craziness!

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Force of Nature/Viral Vidiots: At a park clean up, Timmy wishes the animals would pick up after themselves. The animals unite and launch an all-out attack on Timmy

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 23
programme.desc: The Past and the Furious: Cosmo and Wanda take Timmy on a trip back in time to meet some of their past Godkids. But things take a turn for the worst when Timmy interacts with the past and alters the future!

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 42
programme.desc: Curly Snaps/Preteen Scream: Curly gets enraged after a minor playground mix-up. He locks himself in the principal's office and refuses to come out. Phoebe has a secret crush on a pop star.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Timmy's tired of being the guinea pig when the fairies, anti-fairies and pixies compete to see "who is the best magical creature in the universe?" He suggests a competition to determine once and for all who is best.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A six-year-old argument between Drake and Josh is suddenly rekindled when their conflicting accounts of a incident at a San Diego Padres game finds them each placing the blame on the other.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The guys are visited by their hometown friend who happens to be an awesome singer, but also the world’s biggest klutz! At the same time, James is visited by a fan whose behavior quickly turns from complimentary to stalker.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Coming to terms with how their world has changed, the guys decide to take control and with Gustavo plan their first big concert.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: In our season finale, Drake and Josh go on the Dr. Phyliss Show and relive some of their most outlandish moments. Some will jab at your funny bone, while others will tug on your heart strings.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 104
programme.desc: Lost Jacket, Falling Pigeons: When Dub gives the girls bonuses for Sky Whale's success, Babe buys herself a fancy new jacket. But she is crushed when she loses it. (S1, ep 4)

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 118
programme.desc: Shark Explosion: Triple G's mom Jackie invites the kids on her yacht. But she and Double G have doubled booked the yacht, causing the pair to compete for the kids' affection. (S1, ep 18)

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: James' mom, nicknamed the "Estee Lauder of the Midwest" for her successful cosmetics line, arrives at the Palm Woods to bring James home and groom him to take over the family company.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: It's Aunt Catherine's wedding day, and Drake and Josh are in charge of picking up the cake. But their wedding plans get crashed when their car breaks down.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: After Bellview High nerd, Eric Blonnowitz accidentally punches Drake he finds a newfound world of fame, popularity and girls.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: After Drake agrees to help Josh with his girl troubles, Josh finds himself promising to play a birthday song at his crush's party.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 25
programme.desc: While Gustavo struggles to write the band's next hit song, the guys try to cheer up Kendall, who is heartbroken after his break-up with Jo.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 23
programme.desc: Lucy, an 18-year-old rocker chick moves into the Palm Woods and she immediately blows the BTR guys away by how cool she is. Carlos and James are desperate to date Lucy, while Kendall tries to prove that BTR can rock too.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 116
programme.desc: Babe and Kenzie are nominated for a Girl Power Award. Kenzie soon realises the award show is a scam, but Babe is determined to win her first trophy ever.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Babe and Kenzie work to convince Double G to partner with them in their new venture while Triple G works to convince the girls to let him join the team.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Blessed with his unconventional dance moves, Josh decides to try out for the local dance contest.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Kendall and Lucy are about to have their first kiss when her good looking ex-boyfriend Beau shows up to win her back. Griffin recruits Logan and Carlos to help him prepare for corporate espionage.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 114
programme.desc: When the kids discover a hacker has put their new game Nasty Goats on an illegal website, they track him down in Alaska. With the help of Double G, they strike a deal.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: Dub's recently announced bid for mayor gets off to a rocky start after he snubs a newborn, so the Game Shakers step up to help him get over his fear of babies and end "Babygate" once and for all.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Drake has taken advantage of Josh for the last time and Josh decides that he is done dealing with Drake.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 20
programme.desc: James' fairy tale romance with a foreign princess quickly becomes an escape mission after he inadvertently proposes marriage, and the guys have to free him before he's forced into a royal wedding.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 109
programme.desc: The Game Shakers take the subway to a boxing game pitch, but forget the gloves and send Trip and Hudson back for them. Dub goes to save Trip from the subway.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Drake bets that he can last longer without junk food than Josh can without video games. Who will win.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It's BTR's final stop on their world tour and we go behind the scenes and see all the craziness that happens backstage. Mixing in real concert footage, we see the guys prepare for the show and deal with backstage drama.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Big Time Dreams Pt. 1: It’s the Tween Choice Awards, and BTR is nominated and booked to close the show! However, their night is in jeopardy when the guys uncover an evil plan to brainwash the audience.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 211
programme.desc: To settle a dispute over who Freddie liked better in iCarly - Carly or Sam - the Game Shakers track down Nathan Kress himself and try to get the answer out of him by any means necessary.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Fueled by a love of the opposite sex and fear of commitment, Drake breaks up with his girlfriend only to realize that he may have made the wrong decision.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The guys are continuing to live their Hollywood dream, however James, Logan & Carlos begin showing odd behavior.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 208
programme.desc: After learning that the exact same game idea they're about to pitch to a client was already released by another company, the Game Shakers have twenty minutes to think up a new game.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 18
programme.desc: When Gustavo announces that the boys get to make their first music video, they go overboard and over promise roles to all the kids at the Palm Woods.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Drake takes advantage of Josh's billiard skills by hustling local kids and swindling them out of their money.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: James helps Camille run lines for an audition and they end up kissing! Meanwhile, Gustavo tries to set up Carlos with his first girlfriend, and Kendall and Jo try to balance their hectic schedules so they can see each other.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: After Drake forgets Josh's birthday he tries to make it up to him by taking him to a live taping of "Oprah". Things, however, take a turn when they run into an unexpected guest.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: It’s Halloween in Palm Woodsylvania and the monstrous personas of Big Time Rush come to light. James is a sexy vampire, Logan is a zombie who keeps losing his limbs, Carlos is Franken-Carlos, and Kendall is a werewolf.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 315
programme.desc: After Dub goes to Vegas and leaves Trip behind, the Game Shakers take Trip to Dub's awesome apartment to show him a good time.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: BTR is too famous to be living at the Palm Woods, so Gustavo moves them to Bel Air. However the rules that come with upscale living don’t agree with the guys and they plot their grand escape back to the Palm Woods.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 125
programme.desc: While at Tech Fest, the Game Shakers enlist the Girls Who Code to help them take down an old enemy of Double G's who has returned seeking revenge.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 122
programme.desc: Trip beats a gaming legend, landing him a sponsorship deal with a big company. When the deal turns out to be a nightmare, Dub and the kids must help out.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Big Time Bonus: Gustavo gives the guys a bonus for their hard work, but they quickly begin to make bad decisions with their money.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 110
programme.desc: You Bet Your Bunny: The Game Shakers host a tournament to promote a new Sky Whale update. Double G bets Bunny, thinking Babe will beat one of her classmates. (S1, ep 10)

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 213
programme.desc: In order to finish their new dance game on time, The Game Shakers have to wear a motion capture suit and dance their way through the next 48 hours.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When the Premiere Movie Theater plays host to an actual movie premiere, Josh must act as personal assistant to the film's high maintenance child star.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Megan's been extremely secretive and Drake and Josh investigate to find out what she's up to.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 22
programme.desc: A teen magazine runs a “Win a Date with BTR” contest, and the 4 lucky winning girls – each with their own baggage – give the guys serious dating drama.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Drake is unable to break up with his inappropriately laughing girlfriend because she is the daughter of his teacher who has threatened him with summer school.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Drake and Josh meet the "Great" Henry Doheny, one of the greatest magicians ever - who has fallen on tough times.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 108
programme.desc: Double G has scared Triple G every Halloween since he was a baby. This year he asks Babe and Kenzie to help, but they double-cross him by telling Trip!

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: Kenzie is torn whether to tell on Dub after she sees him tear down his own statue.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: The girls go to Utah to rescue Trip after Dub sends Trip to Captive Meadows - a center for boys with bad behavior.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Josh befriends Drake's doppelganger, a classmate named Drew, and Drake becomes jealous, fearing that Josh is trying to replace him.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: When Dub's brother shows up at Game Shakers and invites everyone except Dub to his wedding, the kids convince him to bring his brother into the fold, promising to make Dub behave himself at the event.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: After the Game Shakers are kicked out of Fooders to make room for a guest who has his photo on the wall, Babe is determined to get their own photo up using any means necessary. Game Component: "Spitty Llama" (App)
